item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
What's new

  • Fixed auto-update: the app's embedded Sparkle public key never matched the actual signing key, so every update signature failed verification ("Erro de atualização!"). If you're on 0.1.1 or 0.1.2, download and install this version manually once — Sparkle auto-update will work correctly from here on.

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
What's new

  • Fixed Claude Code's usage reset countdown never updating — a JSON decode bug always fell back to a fake "now + 5h" instead of the real reset time from Anthropic's API
  • Fixed usage refresh only ever checking one provider instead of all of them, and pausing whenever the app lost focus (which, for a menu-bar app, was almost always)
  • Added a Quit button to Settings, and a Check for Updates… button to the menu bar popover
  • Settings window now scrolls when content doesn't fit, and no longer misaligns when it does
  • Fixed "File ▸ Settings…" and "About" opening a blank window instead of the real UI — both are already one click away from the notch/menu bar
  • About pane now shows the real app version and an auto-updating copyright year
  • Onboarding's permission step is now real: Notifications, Accessibility, Automation, and Launch at Login actually request and reflect system state instead of being disconnected toggles
  • Keychain access no longer prompts during the splash screen — deferred until onboarding finishes
  • Portuguese (Brazil) translations added for all of the above

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
Zeep Pulse 0.1.1

  • Auto-update via Sparkle — the app now checks for new versions and can update itself (Settings → About → "Check for Updates…")
  • Fixed the notch getting stuck expanded after answering a permission or question request
  • Jump-back now switches to the exact terminal tab/session instead of just the frontmost window (Terminal.app, iTerm2, Orca)
  • Fixed automation permissions never prompting for Terminal/System Events access
  • Permission and question cards now show a countdown and expire cleanly instead of silently doing nothing after the agent's decision window closes
  • New notch alert sound
  • Portuguese (Brazil) localization
  • "Start at login" toggle now actually works
